title: sida neelgherrensis
intro: Sida neelgherrensis is a plant species that belongs to the Malvaceae family, commonly known as the cottonwood or hollyhock family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and antimicrobial agent. Sida neelgherrensis can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including a decoction, infusion, or powder, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
